title: Lab 47: Per-User Password Aging
description: Adjust password aging for an existing user account with chage.

tasks.title: Create user cycle47 with password cinder9 if it
tasks.prompt: Create user cycle47 with password cinder9 if it does not already exist.

tasks.title: Configure cycle47 with a maximum password age of 30
tasks.prompt: Configure cycle47 with a maximum password age of 30 days, a minimum age of 2 days, and a warning period of 7 days.

tasks.title: Force cycle47 to change the password at the next login
tasks.prompt: Force cycle47 to change the password at the next login.

hints: Use chage, not manual edits to /etc/shadow.

checks.original_command: chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Minimum number of days between password change[^0-9]*2$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Maximum number of days between password change[^0-9]*30$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Number of days of warning before password expires[^0-9]*7$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Last password change[^:]*: password must be changed'
checks.command: chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Minimum number of days between password change[^0-9]*2$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Maximum number of days between password change[^0-9]*30$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Number of days of warning before password expires[^0-9]*7$' && chage -l cycle47 | grep -Eq 'Last password change[^:]*: password must be changed'
